headline: BofA Boosts Teradyne (TER) Price Target on Industry Growth
summary: Teradyne Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) is one of the best robotics stocks to buy. On June 23, Bank of America analyst Vivek Arya raised the price target on Teradyne Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) to $525 from $365 while maintaining a Buy rating. The update follows a revision of the firm’s semiconductor industry models, with the total addressable market forecast […]
